nodes.name: 索马里
nodes.summary: 索马里是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联143种鸟类，包括索马里鸵鸟、Eastern crested guinea fowl、Yellow-necked spurfowl等143种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Pale prinia
nodes.summary: The pale prinia (Prinia somalica) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, and South Sudan. Its natural habitats are dry savanna and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. References
nodes.shortSummary: The pale prinia (Prinia somalica) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, and South Sudan.

nodes.name: LC
